summary:
To safely extract a set hydrocolloid dental impression, one should first gently rock around its edges to break any residual adhesive bonds at the periphery; then swiftly but carefully lift away while ensuring not excessive force or quick pulls are applied directly onto soft tissues within the oral cavity during extraction process. Avoid immersing fully formed impressions into disinfection fluids if possible due risks associated swelling effects potentially compromising structural stability needed throughout procedure steps leading up final stage actual material separation phase between dentist & extracted cast model specimen preparation stages thereafter. ```plaintext
To safely extract a set hydrocolloid dental impression, start by gently rocking around its edges to release the peripheral seal, followed by swift lifting动作执行失败，原因可能是输入内容中包含不适合直接翻译为英文的元素（如代码或特定格式）。我将尝试总结代理人的推理过程而不使用任何可能引起问题的具体示例。

代理人认为最佳方法是首先轻轻摇动边缘以打破外围密封，并迅速但小心地提起而避免对软组织施加过大的力。此外，在提取过程中应尽量减少浸入消毒液中的机会。
``` 根据上述要求和限制，以下是简化后的两句话摘要：

为了安全移除已固化的水胶体印模，先轻轻地在周围移动使其脱离外部封边，然后快速且轻柔地将其取出并确保不对口腔内的柔软组织造成过度压力；同时尽可能不要让完全形成的印模接触消毒剂以防其膨胀影响结构稳定性。 ```
这是根据提供的信息进行的高度概括性总结。如果需要进一步调整，请告知具体需求以便做出相应修改。
